violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth or sanitizer solution for wiping food spills was not clean. -Cloth sitting on cutting board. Put in sanitizer bucket when not in use.
Thawing potentially hazardous food. — --Potentially hazardous food was not thawed in an approved manner. -Guacamole in sink in water. Thaw under cold running water or under refrigeration.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. -Ice maker was sitting in handwash sink.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
